audit_items.proof_trace: In production builds (NDEBUG defined), all paths in do_cache_free either call free(ptr) or insert ptr into the freelist via STAILQ_INSERT_HEAD — no allocation escapes. In debug builds, two early-return paths (L121, L128) skip freeing ptr, but only after raise(SIGABRT), which terminates the process under default POSIX behavior; these paths are intentional memory-corruption-detection abort paths, not reachable production code.
